name: CloudflareWorkerScriptsR2Connection
description: Cloudflare Worker Scripts R2 connection for accessing an R2 bucket that stores Worker script bundles. Used by Tekton pipelines and Pulumi provider during Worker deployment.

fields.name: bucket_name
fields.description: Name of the Cloudflare R2 bucket where Worker script bundles are stored.

fields.name: account_id
fields.description: Cloudflare account ID (32-character hex string) that owns the R2 bucket.

fields.name: access_key_id
fields.description: Slug of the config-manager secret containing the S3-compatible access key ID for R2.

fields.name: secret_access_key
fields.description: Slug of the config-manager secret containing the S3-compatible secret access key for R2.
